prose: Paraquat is called positive at the assay_mechanism_recovered tier on the strength of curated convergence: CTD lists Parkinson's DirectEvidence and the compound is a registered stressor in a neuro-AOP [E1]. This curated mechanism is the sole basis for the call. Mechanistically, the evidence-ranked hypothesis anchors the molecular initiating event in MitoCarta3.0 Complex-I Q-site subunits, with the adverse outcome falling on the Kamath SOX6/AGTR1 vulnerable dopaminergic-neuron population [E2], and brain-penetrance modeling makes CNS exposure plausible [E5]. Human cohorts report a PD odds ratio near 2–2.5 (Tanner 2011; Pezzoli & Cereda 2013), consistent with but not establishing causation [E4]. The 32 ToxCast assay hits illustrate the postulated chain but serve as corroboration only — anti-diagnostic and not a discriminator [E3]. Taken together, these strands support a coherent, mechanistically grounded hypothesis rather than proof; residual uncertainty remains around dose, exposure route, and inter-study heterogeneity.

citations.detail: Curated convergence: CTD Parkinson's DirectEvidence AND registered neuro-AOP stressor.
MIE grounded in MitoCarta Complex-I Q-site subunits; adverse outcome in the Kamath SOX6/AGTR1 vulnerable dopaminergic-neuron population.
32 mechanistic assay hits illustrate the chain (corroboration only — anti-diagnostic, not a discriminator).
